tables.name: course
tables.description: College courses offered across departments with credit information. Contains 200 courses.

columns.name: credits
columns.description: Number of credit hours for the course. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Values: '3' or '4'.

columns.name: dept_name
columns.description: Name of the department offering the course. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Cybernetics', 'Elec. Eng.', 'Marketing', 'Pol. Sci.', 'Psychology'.

columns.name: title
columns.description: Title or name of the course. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Astronomy', 'Logic', 'Petroleum Engineering', 'European History', 'Visual BASIC'.

tables.name: instructor
tables.description: Faculty instructors with department affiliation and salary. Contains 50 instructors.

columns.name: dept_name
columns.description: Name of the department the instructor belongs to. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Astronomy', 'Athletics', 'Languages', 'Statistics'.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Last name of the instructor. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Romero', 'Tung', 'Konstantinides', 'Gutierrez', 'Bawa'.

columns.name: salary
columns.description: Annual salary of the instructor in dollars. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '79070.08', '50482.03', '32570.5'.

tables.name: teaches
tables.description: Teaching assignments linking instructors to courses with semester and year. Contains 100 records.

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: Title of the course being taught. References course.title. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Embedded Systems', 'Graph Theory', 'The Beatles'.

columns.name: instructor_name
columns.description: Name of the instructor teaching the course. References instructor.name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Mingoz', 'DAgostino', 'Luo'.

columns.name: semester
columns.description: Semester when the course is taught. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Fall' or 'Spring'.

columns.name: year
columns.description: Academic year when the course is taught. Type: TEXT (four-digit year string). Examples: '2002', '2006', '2009', '2010'.
